svg.text: Dimple normalisation — ORIGINAL (FrameCAD) vs NORMALISED (HYTEK rules)
Rules: first/last dimple >= 15mm from each end · max 400mm gap between adjacent dimples · CL-to-CL alignment preserved on every pair.
Red text = position violates rule (FrameCAD original). Green text = compliant (after normalisation).
Box piece (clips on at boxed zone)
#2 — medium box (738mm) — adds 1 dimple to fit 400mm rule
#4 — main chord with TWO boxes (Box1+Box2) — the hardest case
All 10 box pieces in this job normalised: 15mm engagement margins · max 400mm gaps · CL-to-CL match preserved on every pair.
Configurable via --dimple-margin (default 15mm) and --dimple-max-gap (default 400mm). In production: editor settings, not CLI.
